creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Side note: the four corresponding pages at <https://download.freebsd.org/doc/en/books/fdp-primer/fdp-primer_en.pdf#%5B%7B%22num%22%3A203%2C%22gen%22%3A0%7D%2C%7B%22name%22%3A%22XYZ%22%7D%2C0%2C765.17%2Cnull%5D> would be better landscape than portrait. 

I assume that an automated mixture of portrait and (non-rotated) landscape is not possible, or not easy, with the current infrastructure for documentation.
